title: Mayor Owens Announces Adoption of Inaugural Climate Action Plan
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced adoption of Syracuse's inaugural Climate Action Plan (CAP), a comprehensive strategy addressing energy, transportation, climate adaptation, and natural environment resilience. The plan includes emission reduction targets aligned with New York State climate policy and is supported by three interactive vulnerability maps developed through community partnership and state grant funding.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation

political_signal.description: Mayor Owens champions climate resiliency as core city priority; positions CAP as foundational governance roadmap; demonstrates state-local partnership alignment on environmental protection mandates.
